title: Sky: Origins
description: This mod adds the opportunity to be a Sky Kid from Sky: COTL
body:
![Sky Kid flying over a sky ocean](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88ba857d4177b531726d676275f553d2913fca19_0.webp)
This FABRIC mod adds the opportunity to be a Child of The Light from Sky: COTL.
Please keep in mind that this mod is still in early development, meaning anything is subject to change or break, and that I am still open for suggestions and ideas.
 
Origin:
The Sky Kid origin works similarly to how it does in the original game, with the powers being as follows:
 
Born of the Light
You store Light inside of yourself, which can be recharged from certain Light sources, with candles on cakes being the most efficient. Light can only be recharged by three sources at a time, with more efficient light sources taking priority.
 
Divine Protection
Your Light serves as a shield from damage, using up Light whenever it has to protect you. The amount used varies by the amount of damage taken. If your Light runs out, you will be able to take actual damage.
 
Light Cape
With the power of your Light, you can glide with a special cape. While gliding, you can press the space bar to use a portion of your light to boost yourself forward a small amount.
 
Sky's Call
Your primary ability will make a calling sound, which briefly makes you glow unless you're crouching. As your secondary ability, you can spend a considerable portion of your Light in order to heal allies around you!
 
Childish Aspects
As the Origin, you are a child. Therefore, you are delicate and petite, having only four hearts if your Light runs out. Also, you are just short enough to fit in one block gaps when crouching.
 
Free Spirit
Your flight is hindered by chest and leg pieces, so you've instead done away with them. Besides, physical armor doesn't protect your Light.
 
Bulky and Unwieldy
Due to your small hands and short stature, shields are too bulky and unwieldy for you to actually use.
